zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I於1091年出生在賀爾左圖姆 包莫時，他的父親Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II46歲，母親Duchess Anna41歲。他於1114年之後與Helena vel Heila von Sachsen在波蘭申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1135年8月9日享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I于1091年出生在賀爾左圖姆 包莫时，他的父亲Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II46岁，母亲Duchess Anna41岁。他于1114年之后与Helena vel Heila von Sachsen在波兰申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1135年8月9日享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

en.lifeSummary: When Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I was born in 1091, in Duchy of Pomerania, his father, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, was 46 and his mother, Duchess Anna, was 41. He married Helena vel Heila von Sachsen after 1114, in Szczecin District, Szczecin, Poland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 9 August 1135, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I est né en 1091, à Herzogtum Pommern, son père, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Duchess Anna, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Helena vel Heila von Sachsen après 1114, à Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 9 août 1135, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.Pommerin voivodikunta Poland, Pommerin v: Poland, Poland Township, Mahoning, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I 1091 in Herzogtum Pommern geboren wurde, war sein Vater Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II 46 und seine Mutter Duchess Anna 41. Er hat nach 1114 in Powiat szczeciński, Woiwodschaft Stettin, Polen Helena vel Heila von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 9. August 1135 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I è nato il nel 1091 nel Herzogtum Pommern, il suo padre, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Duchess Anna, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Helena vel Heila von Sachsen dopo il 1114, nel Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 9 agosto 1135, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania Iが1091年にハーゾグトゥム ポンメルンで生まれた時，父Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern IIは46歳，母Duchess Annaは41歳であった。1114年以後にポーランドスズクズエシnスキポウィアト スズクズエシnスキでHelena vel Heila von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1135年8月9日に44歳で死去した。

ko.Pommerin voivodikunta Poland, Pommerin v: 미국 오하이오 주 머호닝 포랜드 타운시프 포랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I(이)가 1091년 허초그투 폼머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess Anna(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1114년 이후 폴란드 스즈치시n스키 파위앳 스즈치시n스키에서 Helena vel Heila von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1135년 8월 9일 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I nasceu em 1091, em Herzogtum Pommern, seu pai, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Anna, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Helena vel Heila von Sachsen após 1114, em Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1135, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I родился в 1091 г. в местности хирзогтум поммирн, его отцу по имени Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Anna, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Helena vel Heila von Sachsen после 1114 г. в местности поуят сзкзесиnски, сзкзесиnски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 9 августа 1135 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I nació en 1091, en Herzogtum Pommern, su papá, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Duchess Anna, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Helena vel Heila von Sachsen después de 1114, en Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1135, a la edad de 44 años.
